_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: we combined each targeted and metabolic inhibitor to investigate genotype-driven synergy changes using a Bliss Synergy model and the SynergyFinder R package
details: Successfully calculated and visualized Bliss synergy scores for drug combinations, identifying synergistic interactions (scores >10) between metabolic and targeted inhibitors
